description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Deploy to Steam that can be triggered manually with inputs for ref, version, and release channel. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, setting up Python 3, installing dependencies, cloning DFHack with submodules, fetching 3rd party SDKs, and configuring and building DFHack for Linux and Windows. Finally, it should deploy the build to Steam using the game-ci/steam-deploy action.
